subject: New Request: Backend Engineer – Java – Fintech
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Payloop
ROLE: Senior Backend Engineer
START: 2024-05-01
DURATION: 18 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / remote
RATE: To be discussed

The team works primarily with Java, Kubernetes and Redis.

Key requirements:
• Java
• Kubernetes
• Redis

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Marcus Holm
IT Recruitment Specialist
TechLink Sweden
Tel: +46 70 234 56 78
